arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes leaving admission and explains Man City exit process
arts.sum: Latest Manchester City news as Pep Guardiola faces the media ahead of the trip to Wolves

arts.ttl: Man City pursuit of £60m Wolves star boosted by boardroom changes?
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly preparing to take the lead in the race for Wolverhampton Wanderers defender Rayan Ait-Nouri due to boardroom changes at the Etihad.

arts.ttl: Man City star says club have 'already decided' who will replace Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola was strongly linked with taking over the England national team before Thomas Tuchel’s appointment but he could still be on the way out

arts.ttl: Manchester City news: Could Xabi Alonso replace Pep Guardiola this summer?
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly considering Bayer Leverkusen's Xabi Alonso and Sporting Lisbon's Ruben Amorim as potential replacements for Pep Guardiola.

arts.ttl: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Manchester City: Head-to-head record and past meetings
arts.sum: Ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Wolves and Man City, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Wolves vs. Man City: Erling Haaland's record vs. West Midlands outfit
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes a look at Manchester City striker Erling Haaland's record against Wolves, including overall wins, goals and assists.

arts.ttl: Man City guaranteed to be without four starters vs Wolves as Nathan Ake and Kevin De Bruyne calls made
arts.sum: Manchester City visit Wolves in the Premier League on Sunday as top flight football returns

arts.ttl: Premier League predictions GW8: Man United to lose again as Man City, Liverpool slip up
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes on proFESSional lead guitarist Rob Hennebry for a Premier League predictions challenge in gameweek eight of the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: Wolves 'tipping point' must come soon - O'Neil
arts.sum: Wolves boss Gary O'Neil says the side cannot continue to rely on excuses and "the longer it goes on the more urgent it becomes".

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: Part of me will leave Man City when Txiki Begiristain goes
arts.sum: Begiristain will leave at the end of the season, when Guardiola is also out of contract.
